name: Brinno BCC2000Plus Construction Trio Bundle Pack with Camera Extender Kit
description: The Brinno BCC2000Plus Construction Trio Bundle Pack with Camera Extender Kit includes a TLC2000 time-lapse camera, an AFB1000 outdoor camera extender kit, an ATH2000 construction power housing, and an ACC1000 clamp mount kit for a time-lapse video recording solution.

features.Key Features:: TLC2000 Outdoor Time-Lapse Camera | AFB1000 Outdoor Camera Extender Kit | ATH2000 Construction Power Housing | 1080p Resolution | 2" TFT LCD Screen | 118° Field of View | CS Mount | ACC1000 Clamp Mount Kit Included | Supports microSD Cards up to 128GB | Suitable for Outdoor Use
